title: Harris' Closing Argument, Trump Mass Deportations Plan, Head Start Changes : Up First from NPR : NPR
excerpts:
Section Title: ... > Harris' Closing Argument, Trump Mass Deportations Plan, Head Start Changes
Content:
And this is Steve. We are following the election, of course, as everybody is, and we're glad you're joining us for UP FIRST. There are other ways to make sure you do not miss a development through the day.
MARTIN: First, every weekday, you can find a new episode of the NPR Politics Podcast with context and analysis on the big stories whenever they happen. So you get an alert - big breaking news - you don't know what to think. Look for the NPR Politics Podcast a few hours later.
INSKEEP: And you can also hear Consider This - a podcast in which NPR covers one big story in depth every weekday evening. They're all over this election and the aftermath and anything else happening in the world. So you got UP FIRST in the morning, Consider This in the evening, the NPR Politics Podcast anytime big stuff happens.

title: A conversation with Tara Brach & Dan Harris
excerpts: The healing of our deepest wounds often begins with being able to hold our own being with a forgiving heart.

title: Tamara Beauboeuf-Lafontant: To Live More Abundantly
excerpts: This book examines how her philosophy of “living more abundantly” envisioned educational access and institutionalized campus thriving for Black college women.

title: Tara Brach: Making it RAIN - 10% Happier with Dan Harris
excerpts: Jan 29, 2020 — In this episode Brach details how her method, which goes by the acronym RAIN, provides steps to help us face and process our own emotions.
